feed.title: App Store Discounts（US）
feed.subtitle: App Store Discounts - Made with love by appstore-discounts(https://github.com/appstore-discounts/appstore-discounts) feedId:49753370488353792+userId:73658201673997312 feedId:157008699750812672+userId:73658201673997312

entry.title: 🎉 Welcome to subscribe to App Store Discounts
entry.summary: Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!
entry.content:
Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!

About our RSS feed

  • Focused on delivering App Store app discount information
  • Whenever an app's price drops or in-app purchases go on sale, we will promptly send you a notification
  • Each app's discount information is presented in a separate feed
  • The RSS feed is completely open-source, allowing you to view, contribute, and add your favorite apps at any time

Find Us

App Store Discounts

Finally

If this project has been helpful to you, would you kindly give us a ⭐️

entry.title: Statistical Data Report
entry.content:
Country or Region Tracked

  1. Mainland China(CN)
  2. Hong Kong, China(HK)
  3. Macao, China(MO)
  4. Taiwan, China(TW)
  5. United States(US)
  6. Türkiye(TR)
  7. Portugal(PT)

Statistics of the Number of App Tracked

Category Total Apps Artificially Added Automatically Added Prohibit Push
All 2026 201 1825 95
US 1876 176 1700 77

Ranking of App Discounts This Month(US)

Since it supports applications that automatically add tracking based on paid application rankings, most applications are now automatically added, and the quality of the application is unknown and uncontrollable. The current ranking will be used as a reference for subsequent disabling push.
Ranking App Number of Discounts
1 Cello Tuner Professional
  • Total Times：5
  • Price：3
  • In-App Purchases

entry.title: SessionBand Jazz Fusion
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$9.99 → $3.99 [$2.99 ~ $9.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$3.99

Application Description

SessionBand Jazz Fusion – Tom Cawley Special Synth & Vintage Keys Edition Create studio-quality Jazz Fusion tracks to your own chords in minutes with this special artist edition of the award-winning SessionBand app - the world’s only chord-based loop app. With over 20,000 precision-cut, chord-based loops across 15 diverse Jazz Fusion styles included, the app instantly converts the chords you select into great-sounding audio - wherever you are and whatever your ability. Perfect for songwriters and producers and the ultimate play-along for jazz rock and pop instrumentalists. Highly acclaimed, multi award-winning pianist Tom Cawley is one of the most sought-after keyboard players in the world both as a jazz pianist (Dave Weckl, Jack DeJohnette, Charlie Watts, Jamie Cullum, Guy Barker...), and as a leading pop/rock keyboardist, recording and performing around the world with U2, Peter Gabriel, Andrea Bocelli, Amy Winehouse and many others. For this special Jazz Fusion edition, Tom is joined by 2 of the world's top session musicians: Simon Lea – Drums (Rod Stewart, Dionne Warwick, James Blunt, James Morrison, Katie Melua...) and Geoff Gascoyne – Bass (Sting, Van Morrison, Georgie Fame...). Tom's passion for jazz and for modern and vintage keys is reflected in the diverse range of styles in this edition. And Tom has employed many of the best keyboards from his vast personal collection: from the Oberheim OB-6, Prophet 12 and Moog Model D (as well as a modular set-up), to his vintage Fender Rhodes, Wurlitzer and Hohner Pianet - they all feature in the content of this app. And to do full justice to this genre, we have increased the number of chord variations to 15 for every root note in all 15 styles! Alongside pro features like automated mixing, auto-transpose, one-touch live recording and a range of export functions, there are new tech features and upgrades like channel FX, instant PDF chord sheets and 'Track Builder' to make your track creation quicker and easier. Create professional Jazz Fusion to your own choice of chords in minutes. Everything you need to create and share thousands of stunning royalty-free tracks. Hear the results. Watch the video at sessionbandapp.com The fastest way to create your own studio-quality music: • Pick one of 15 Jazz Fusion styles • Choose your chords • Stretch or shorten loops • Build up your track in minutes • Instantly hear your track across different styles and tempos • Auto-transpose your entire track • Add FX • Mix your track • Adjust track tempo • Record direct to audio • Copy straight to other music apps • Share with the world! The ultimate mobile jam/practice tool for musicians: • Practice with your own world-class band • Loop markers let you focus on specific sections • Mute instrument channels as you like • Produce PDF chord sheets for the tracks you create...instantly • 'Flip' your track across other styles and tempos • Transpose your whole track instantly You don't have to be a musician to create seriously good music and release it royalty-free! • Simple, intuitive interface • Audition the loop you are about to insert • ‘Track Builder’ allows simple creation of a full track • Intuitive mixing and record functions Detailed Product Information: • 15 diverse Jazz Fusion styles: Acoustic Rock; 70s Funk; Pop Rock; Neo Soul; Psychedelic Soul; 70s Soul; Jazz Rock; Disco Funk; Neo Classical; Latin Fusion; Indie Pop; Electro Pop; Electro Jazz; DnB; Groovy Six Four • Tempos from 60bpm to 200bpm • 15 chord variations for every root note: maj; maj7; maj7(#11); 11; 7; 7(b9); 7(#9,#5); 7(#11); min; m(#5); m7(9); m(maj7); m7(b5); dim; maj ‘stop’ • 20 alternative drum grooves/drum fills in every style in addition to the main drum groove • The musical content in this app cannot be found in any of the other SessionBand apps • All loops are offered royalty-free and can be used freely in your own works

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: SessionBand Jazz 4
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$5.99 → $3.99 [$2.99 ~ $5.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$3.99

Application Description

Create professional quality jazz tracks to your own chords in minutes with this brand new edition of the award-winning SessionBand jazz app featuring exclusive, royalty-free, chord-based loops performed by 4 of the world's top jazz musicians: Jason Rebello (Piano); Jeremy Stacey (Drums); Patrick Clahar (Sax) and Geoff Gascoyne (Bass). Volume 4 is the ultimate jazz play-along and the perfect tool for jazz songwriters. And we have added loads of extra features and tech improvements since Volumes 1, 2 and 3. Here's what you get: 1. 15 chord variations per root note! From straight major and minors right through to the most exotic jazz chords 2. 20 alternative drum grooves/fills in each style 3. Free access to over 150 downloadable jazz standards ready to play along to in any key! 4. Instant PDF chord sheets for the tracks you create 5. New tech enhancements like 'Track Builder' to make the workflow even faster. With over 15,000 precision-cut, chord-based loops included in the download, the app instantly converts the chords you select into great sounding, royalty-free audio - wherever you are and whatever your ability. For this long-awaited edition, we have gone back to mostly classic jazz with a couple of contemporary styles. Among the classics, expect to hear medium, post-bop Wayne Shorter swing styles in four and three, plus Wes Montgomery and Ahmad Jamal-inspired up-tempo swing styles. There's a contemporary Brad Mehldau-type piano and string style in 5/4 and a wonderful carnival-like worldbeat Cuban number with many rich, melodic tenor sax loops to choose from. Create professional jazz tracks to your own choice of chords in minutes. Everything you need to create, share and publish thousands of stunning royalty-free jazz tracks. Hear the results. Watch the video at www.sessionbandapp.com The fastest way to create your own studio-quality jazz: • Pick one of 8 jazz styles • Choose your chords • Stretch or shorten loops • Build up your track in minutes • Instantly hear your track across different styles and tempos • Auto-transpose your entire track • Add FX • Mix • Change tempo • Record direct to audio • Copy straight to other music apps • Share with the world! The ultimate mobile jam/practice tool for musicians: • Practice with your own world-class quartet • Loop markers let you focus on specific sections • Mute instrument channels as you like • Produce PDF chord sheets for the tracks you create...instantly • 'Flip' your track across other styles and tempos • Transpose your whole track instantly • Download backing tracks for over 150 jazz standards for free (with chord sheets) ready to play. Transpose them with just one touch! Get some of the world's best jazz musicians playing on your tracks: • Jason Rebello (Piano): Sting; Jeff Beck; Wayne Shorter; Peter Gabriel... • Jeremy Stacey (Drums): Noel Gallagher's High Flying Birds; King Crimson; Amy Winehouse; Take That; Eric Clapton... • Patrick Clahar (Sax); Bill Bruford's Earthworks; Incognito; Stevie Wonder; James Brown... • Geoff Gascoyne (Bass); Sting; Van Morrison; Guy Barker; Georgie Fame... You don't have to be a musician to create seriously good music and release it royalty-free! • Simple, intuitive interface • Audition the loop you are about to insert • ‘Track Builder’ allows simple creation of a full track • Intuitive mixing and record functions Detailed Product Information: • 8 classic and contemporary jazz styles: Elvin Swing; McCoy Three; Mozambique; Sting Swing; Latin Strings; Classical Five; Swing Bass; Up Swing Strings • Tempos from 107bpm to 190bpm • 15 chord variations for every root note: maj; maj7; maj7(#11); 11; 7; 7(b9); 7(#9,#5); 7(#11); min; m(#5); m7(9); m(maj7); m7(b5); dim; maj ‘stop’ • 20 alternative drum grooves/drum fills in every style in addition to the main drum groove • The musical content in this app cannot be found in any of the other SessionBand apps • All loops are offered royalty-free and can be used freely in your own works

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: SessionBand Soul Jazz Funk 3
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$5.99 → $3.99 [$2.99 ~ $5.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$3.99

Application Description

Create studio-quality soul, jazz and funk tracks to your own chords in minutes with the latest edition of the award-winning SessionBand app – the world’s only chord-based loop app. Featuring exclusive royalty-free, chord-based loops performed by 4 of the world's top jazz musicians: Jason Rebello (Keyboards); Jeremy Stacey (Drums); Patrick Clahar (Sax) and Geoff Gascoyne (Bass). Volume 3 is the ultimate soul jazz funk play-along and the perfect tool for songwriters. Here's what you get: • 15 chord variations per root note in every style! From straight major and minors right through to the most exotic soul jazz chords • 20 alternative drum grooves/fills in each style • Instant PDF chord sheets for the tracks you create • New tech enhancements like ‘Track Builder’ to make the workflow even faster With over 15,000 precision-cut, chord-based loops included in the download, the app instantly converts the chords you select into great-sounding, royalty-free audio - wherever you are and whatever your ability. This latest edition contains a diverse spread of 8 soul jazz funk styles from a Herbie Hancock slow burn, laid-back 70's funk groove all the way through to an exciting, uptempo neo-latin jazz rock groove in 7/4. You can check out samples of all the styles at www.sessionbandapp.com/sessionband-soul-jazz-funk-3-music-app-create-backing-tracks/ SessionBand Soul Jazz Funk 3 is a professional app – essential for anyone learning jazz music and perfect for soul jazz funk musicians looking for the ultimate play-along. But equally, it’s simple enough for non-musicians who love music to create their own great sounding, copyright-free soul jazz funk music and share it with the world – even if they don’t play a note! Create professional soul jazz funk tracks to your own choice of chords in minutes. Everything you need to create, share and publish thousands of stunning royalty-free tracks. The fastest way to create your own studio-quality tracks: • Pick one of 8 soul jazz funk styles • Choose your chords • Stretch or shorten loops • Build up your track in minutes • Instantly hear your track across different styles and tempos • Auto-transpose your entire track • Add FX • Mix • Change tempo • Record direct to audio • Copy straight to other music apps • Share with the world! The ultimate mobile jam/practice tool for musicians: • Practice with your own world-class band • Loop markers let you focus on specific sections • Mute instrument channels as you like • Produce PDF chord sheets for the tracks you create…instantly • ‘Flip’ your track across other styles and tempos • Transpose your whole track instantly Get the world’s best musicians playing on your tracks: • Jason Rebello (Keyboards): Sting; Jeff Beck; Wayne Shorter; Peter Gabriel… • Jeremy Stacey (Drums): Noel Gallagher’s High Flying Birds; King Crimson; Amy Winehouse; Take That; Eric Clapton… • Patrick Clahar (Sax); Bill Bruford’s Earthworks; Incognito; Stevie Wonder; James Brown… • Geoff Gascoyne (Bass); Sting; Van Morrison; Guy Barker; Georgie Fame… You don’t have to be a musician to create seriously good music and release it royalty-free! • Simple, intuitive interface • Audition the loop you are about to insert • ‘Track Builder’ allows simple creation of a full track • Intuitive mixing and record functions Detailed Product Info: • 4,320 chord-based multi channel loop stacks (Over 15,000 individual loops) • 8 diverse soul jazz funk styles: Laid-Back Funk; 70’s Funk; Swing Beat; Rare Groove; Latin Groove; Broken Beat; Jazz Rock; Groove In Seven • Tempos from 60bpm to 220bpm • 15 chord variations for every root note: maj; maj7; maj7(#11); 11; 7; 7(b9); 7(#9,#5); 7(#11); min; m(#5); m7(9); m(maj7); m7(b5); dim; maj ‘stop’ • 20 alternative drum grooves/drum fills in every style in addition to the main drum groove The musical content in this app cannot be found in any of the other SessionBand apps. All loops are offered royalty-free and can be used freely in your own works.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Fishow - Just a Cast Away
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$1.99 → $0.99 [$0.99 ~ $2.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$0.99

In-App Purchases

  • North American Legends：$0.99
  • Nightmare of the Deep：$0.99
  • Apex Sharks：$0.99
  • Living Fossils：$0.99
  • Amazon River Monsters：$0.99
  • Polar Giants：$0.99
  • Primeval Hunters：$0.99
  • Apex Lure Pack (× 99)：$6.99
  • Fishow Pro Species Pack：$1.99
  • Fishow Species Collection：$6.99

Application Description

Sixteen diverse fishing locations, from ponds to the deep sea Rich biodiversity, ranging from tiny isopods to massive oceanic whales, from extinct ancient species to rare deep-sea Chthonoids Realistic and detailed species data, combined with meticulously crafted environmental and weather systems, ensures a unique experience with every cast Intricately designed AI gives every fish unique personalities and behaviors Real-time motion data combined with deep physics simulations delivers an incredibly smooth feel Exquisitely illustrated species guides—from 1-star to 9-star—are crafted with equal care, making every catch worthwhile Rich and detailed species descriptions let you build your own aquatic encyclopedia as you collect Enjoy the fun of fishing anytime, anywhere, no matter where you are If you have an Apple Watch, simply flip your wrist to reel in a catch “Fishow” lets you relax and enjoy the joy of fishing and the thrill of collecting in every moment

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: 20 Minutes Till Dawn:Premium
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$4.99 → $2.99 [$1.99 ~ $4.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$2.99

Application Description

Survive the onslaught of an endless horde of monsters for 20 minutes! 20 Minutes Till Dawn is a roguelike, shoot'em up where you mow down endless hordes of monstrous baddies. 【Unique Builds Every Run】 In this roguelite survival game, select from a variety of upgrades to create a unique and overpowered builds every run. You can be a fire wizard, for example, and ignite monsters with every pump of your shotgun, or an agile ninja who controls magic knives to pierce your enemies. 【Select Your Hero】 Choose from a diverse selection of characters and weapons that offer a variety of gameplay experiences. 【Features】 *Over 80 different upgrades to choose from for a unique experience every run! *Wide cast of characters, with more to come post-launch. *Casual quick 10-20 minute play sessions, for busy gamers. *Rune System helps you become stronger 【Contact Us】 Discord: https://discord.gg/efTYchSsHZ Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/Erabitstudios Twitter: https://twitter.com/erabit_studios

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Groic : Listen music togther
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • Starter Pack (50 Vibes)：$2.99 → $0.99 [$0.99 ~ $2.99]

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • Groic Pro Monthly：$1.99
  • Groic Pro Yearly：$14.99
  • Groic Pro Half-Yearly：$8.99
  • Starter Pack (50 Vibes)：$0.99
  • Legend Pack (500 Vibes)：$4.99
  • Starter Pack (220 Vibes)：$2.99

Application Description

With Groic, you can listen to music and radio with your friends anytime and anywhere! Listen to your favorite music and chat with your friends in real time. This app does not require you to have Spotify Premium or Apple Music. Groic is free to download. A Groic Pro subscription is required to access the app's features for users outside India. Users in India enjoy full access for free, and existing users who previously purchased Groic continue to have full access at no additional cost. What you get with Groic: Listen to music with your friends in real time Listen to various radios from around the world Create and share your own music collection Chat with your friends while listening together Search for any song you might be interested in Upload your own songs to your library Discover top charts from your country and explore various genres When a song ends, Groic plays similar songs for non-stop entertainment Groic Pro unlocks the full experience: • Ad-free listening — stream music without interruption • A glowing username that stands out in every chat room • Unlimited room creation — host as many music sessions as you want • Join full rooms — never miss out when your friends are already vibing • Access to the complete Groic music and radio library Groic is the best way to chat in real time while listening to music together. Groic Pro Subscription Pricing: Monthly: $1.99 Half-Yearly: $8.99 Yearly: $14.99 Payments and Renewal: Payment will be charged to your iTunes Account at confirmation of purchase. Subscription automatically renews unless auto-renew is turned off at least 24 hours before the end of the current period. Your account will be charged for renewal within 24 hours prior to the end of the current period, at the cost of the chosen package. You can manage your subscriptions and turn off auto-renewal by going to your Account Settings on the App Store after purchase. No cancellation of the current subscription is allowed during the active subscription period. Any unused portion of a free trial period, if offered, will be forfeited when the user purchases a subscription. Terms of Use: https://sites.google.com/view/groic/terms-of-use Privacy Policy: https://sites.google.com/view/groic/privacy-policy

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: Wall of insanity
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$2.99 → $0.99 [$0.39 ~ $2.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$0.99

Application Description

Wall of Insanity is a new project from the creators of the Slaughter game series. It features a dark storyline, intense action, and a mystical journey into a dead, smoldering world. You will face the unknown. A descent into a kingdom of anxiety and madness. The path through the abyss will be difficult, the trek extremely dangerous, and you will be left almost hopeless. Story: A police operation to detain a dangerous cult's sectarians leads to unexpectedly deadly consequences. That squad vanished under mysterious circumstances, and the Special Unit soldiers sent in to investigate their disappearance find just an empty, abandoned house. This is only where the story begins... Key Features: - Active battles with the use of firearms. Survival depends on caution, reaction speed, and weapon accuracy. Use elements of the environment itself to escape this horrific world. - A journey to another world where fear, sorrow, and madness rule. A diligently crafted, ominous environment, fraught with mystery and danger, lies ahead of you. How far will you dare to go? - A plethora of traps and enemies await around every corner. Investigate your surroundings carefully. Don't take unnecessary risks. Study your enemies. Carefully selected tactics will save your ammunition. And your life. - Explore the world to replenish and expand your arsenal. Weapons and useful items will be needed. Look for secrets, documents, and workarounds to prevail against all odds. - Wall of Insanity features simple controls, gamepad support, good optimization, and a wide graphics customization.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Chemistry Periodic Table 2026
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$1.99 → Free [Free ~ $19.99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

Application Description

Discover the Periodic Table like never before with our innovative 3D app! Immerse yourself in the fascinating world of elements in a completely new and visually stunning way. Our app offers you a minimalist and captivating experience that will make exploring the Periodic Table a uniquely engaging journey. With our intuitive interface and minimalist design, you can effortlessly navigate through the elements. Each element comes to life in a captivating 3D environment, allowing you to visualize its structure in a way you've never experienced before. Witness how elements interact with each other and uncover their properties in a completely new light. Want to learn more about a specific element? Our app provides detailed and easily understandable information about each element, covering everything from its physical and chemical properties to its history and practical uses. Learning about the Periodic Table has never been so accessible and exciting. Perfect for students, professionals, and science enthusiasts alike, our app caters to all. Whether you're studying chemistry or simply curious about the world of elements, our 3D app offers an educational and entertaining experience. Download now and dive into the beauty of the Periodic Table in a way you never imagined. Explore, learn, and marvel at the elements with our 3D app today!

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Fishow - Just a Cast Away
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$1.99 → $0.99 [$0.99 ~ $2.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$0.99

In-App Purchases

  • North American Legends：$0.99
  • Nightmare of the Deep：$0.99
  • Apex Sharks：$0.99
  • Living Fossils：$0.99
  • Amazon River Monsters：$0.99
  • Polar Giants：$0.99
  • Primeval Hunters：$0.99
  • Apex Lure Pack (× 99)：$6.99
  • Fishow Pro Species Pack：$1.99
  • Fishow Species Collection：$6.99

Application Description

Sixteen diverse fishing locations, from ponds to the deep sea Rich biodiversity, ranging from tiny isopods to massive oceanic whales, from extinct ancient species to rare deep-sea Chthonoids Realistic and detailed species data, combined with meticulously crafted environmental and weather systems, ensures a unique experience with every cast Intricately designed AI gives every fish unique personalities and behaviors Real-time motion data combined with deep physics simulations delivers an incredibly smooth feel Exquisitely illustrated species guides—from 1-star to 9-star—are crafted with equal care, making every catch worthwhile Rich and detailed species descriptions let you build your own aquatic encyclopedia as you collect Enjoy the fun of fishing anytime, anywhere, no matter where you are If you have an Apple Watch, simply flip your wrist to reel in a catch “Fishow” lets you relax and enjoy the joy of fishing and the thrill of collecting in every moment

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: 倉頡詞典
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$9.99 → $3.99 [$3.99 ~ $9.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$3.99

Application Description

倉頡輸入法(Cangjie Input)是一種常用的中文輸入法,由有「中文電腦之父」稱譽的台灣人朱邦復先生於1976年創製。初期只有正體中文版本,原名「形意檢字法」,用以解決電腦處理漢字的問題,包括漢字輸入、字形輸出、內碼儲存、漢字排序等。朱邦復發明此輸入法時正值他為三軍大學發展中文通訊系統之際,時任三軍大學校長的蔣緯國將軍為紀念上古時期倉頡造字之精神,乃於1978年將此輸入法重新定名為「倉頡輸入法」。 1982年,朱邦復登報公開放棄倉頡輸入法專利權,並且極力推動電腦之中文化。現今大部分作業系統,甚至一些電子辭典皆附有倉頡輸入法,為正體中文世界最普及的形碼輸入法。 倉頡輸入法適用於多種平臺,主流作業系統和大部分電子辭典均有內嵌。一些線上漢字字典也採用倉頡編碼作為檢索工具。 本程式為一眾學倉頡的用家而設計,使用者只需輸入你要查詢的字,就能自動列出該字的倉頡碼及速成碼。 感謝大家使用倉頡字典(Cangjie Input dictionary)及速成字典(Quick Input dictionary)，這兩本輸入法字典。

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Skel and Defense
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • Skin Ticket x1：$0.49 → $0.29 [$0.29 ~ $0.49]

All Price Information

Price：$1.99

In-App Purchases

  • Blessing of Experience：$1.99
  • Skin Ticket x3：$0.99
  • Skin Ticket x8：$2.99
  • Skin Ticket x1：$0.29

Application Description

◆ Dive into the ultimate dungeon defense experience with 'Skel&Defense! ◆ ◆ Command Your Dungeon, Defend Your Territory! Ever dreamed of being the mastermind behind a formidable dungeon? Now's your chance! Strategically fend off relentless waves of heroes by day and unleash your devious trap layouts by night. It's your dungeon, your rules! ◆Unleash Chaos with a Variety of Traps! With a whopping 26 trap rooms at your disposal, the possibilities are endless! From fiery infernos to icy spikes, poison darts, and electrifying shockwaves, craft the ultimate labyrinth of doom to thwart intruders! ◆ Transform and Conquer with Skel Warriors! Not content with just traps? Harness the power of Skel warriors! Command mage skels, stealthy rogue skels, and stalwart shield skels to turn the tide of battle in your favor! ◆ Conquer Challenging Stages and Endless Mode! Embark on an epic journey through five challenging stages, each with its own unique rewards! Then, test your limits in endless mode, where every wave is a new challenge waiting to be conquered! ◆ Customize Your Experience with Perks! Before each stage, choose from a variety of perks to tailor your gameplay experience! With over 20 unique perks to discover, every playthrough offers something new! ◆ Enhance Your Skills and Uncover Secrets! Clear waves, earn attribute points, and unlock powerful enhancements! Dive into the comprehensive encyclopedia to uncover hidden secrets and unlock new rooms, synergies, and artifacts! ◆ Value-Packed Gaming Guaranteed! We're committed to delivering top-notch entertainment at an unbeatable price! Try it risk-free, and if it doesn't suit your taste, simply request a refund. Your satisfaction is our priority! Don't miss out on the adventure – download 'Skel&Defense' now and become the ultimate dungeon master!

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Inkblade Idlers: Wuxia RPG
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$1.99 → $0.99 [Free ~ $3.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$0.99

In-App Purchases

  • 80 Redemption Tickets：$0.99
  • 1000 Redemption Tickets：$9.99

Application Description

Welcome to "Inkblade Idlers", where the serene beauty of ink-wash painting meets the thrilling world of wuxia martial arts in an idle RPG adventure. Effortless Progression, Deep Strategy Your heroes train and battle automatically, earning silver and experience even when you are offline. Return to spend resources on powerful skills, legendary weapons, and rare manuals to push your team further. Conquer Mighty Bosses, Collect Secret Manuals Face towering martial arts masters in epic showdowns. Each victory unlocks ancient secret manuals that teach your heroes unique and devastating abilities to customize your combat style. Manage Your Martial World Upgrade your shop to increase income, expand your backpack to hold more treasures, and strategically equip your team. Every decision strengthens your path to becoming the ultimate martial arts legend. Key Features: - Breathtaking ink-wash art inspired by traditional Chinese painting - True idle gameplay with progress happening 24/7 - Collect and customize hundreds of weapons, armor, and martial arts manuals - Strategic management of shops, resources, and inventory - Challenging boss fights against powerful martial arts masters Download Inkblade Idlers now and begin your tranquil yet powerful journey to martial arts supremacy. No grinding required.

Discount Information（Price：$2.99 → $1.99 [$1.99 ~ $2.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$1.99

Application Description

• Put the filter that the real writer uses on my picture  • Provides detailed features such as - Apply filters to photos, adjust filter intensity, photo detail correction, film look effect • It offers beautiful filters with various themes - Blue, Ramune, Youth, Anime, Vintage, Star, CityNight, Sunset, Tree, Emphasis • Change your photos with the grain film look effect • Complete your own photos using photo detail correction • Instagram @kankokuma_1228 - Enjoy Kankokuma's photos. @filmn.official - check out the news and various events. entry.title: Seoul Exorcist 1111: Roguelite
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$5.99 → $4.99 [$2.99 ~ $5.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$4.99

In-App Purchases

  • 200,000 x Coins：$9.99
  • 80,000 x Coins：$4.99
  • 40,000 x Coins：$2.99
  • 10,000 x Coins：$0.99

Application Description

Think Fast, Strike Faster! As the ultimate exorcist, choose your attacks wisely, upgrade combat deck, combine traits and items, and save the cursed souls—before death finds you. ▪ Real-Time Turn-Based Combat Enemies react the moment you make a decision—! Fast, tense action with every move. ▪ 4 Characters with Unique Strategies Each with 8 uniques attack types, exclusive animations, and 2 passive traits. Adapt your playstyle for every run. ▪ Time Limit - Think Fast, Strike Faster! You have just 7 minutes to defeat all enemies in each run. You've been relentlessly trained for this moment. ▪ Item & Trait Combinations Strategic synergies that activate automatically during battle. Timing and adaptability are the keys to victory! ▪ Roguelite Clear all 7 maps and the boss in a single run—or get reset! But clearing the same map 3 times unlocks progress. Collect coins, build a stronger deck, and dive back in! ▪ 12 Languages Supported  Korean, English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, French, German, Italian, Spanish, Portuguese, Brazilian Portuguese, and Russian. ▪ Offline Game All data is stored locally. No network required. Be Aware. Uninstalling the app will erase saved data. ▪Discord https://discord.gg/UaZApdWG93 ▪For inquires / bug report snowgames0629@gmail.com

entry.title: This Is the Police
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$7.99 → $1.99 [$0.99 ~ $7.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$1.99

Application Description

Dive into a deep story of corruption, crime and intrigue. Take the role of gritty Police Chief Jack Boyd, and come face to face with the ugly underbelly of Freeburg, a city spiraling the drain. Will Jack reach his retirement with a nice stack of bills, or will he end up broken ... or worse? Manage your staff, respond to emergencies, and investigate crimes in a city on the brink of chaos. The mafia underworld maneuvers behind the scenes, sinking their claws ever deeper into the city, even as the mayor is ready to exploit every situation to his political advantage. Choose your approach to each situation as it unfolds. Sometimes you’ll be responding to a developing crisis at a crime scene, or negotiating with Freeburg’s crime bosses. Sometimes you’ll find yourself dodging questions in the press room, or even the occasional cross-examination in the witness box. Can you keep this pressure cooker from exploding, at least for long enough to stash away a nice retirement nest egg? - Your mission is clear: make $500,000 in 180 days before Jack Boyd reaches retirement. How? That’s up to you! - Decisions, decisions! This Is the Police is all about a dark story and how you react to it. Whatever you decide, your choices will influence the game – and the fate of Jack Boyd. - The Good, the Bad, and... the Ugly? The Chief of Freeburg's Police Department deals with all kind of people. It is up to you to find the bad guys and decide how to deal with them. - Carry out your duties. As head of Freeburg PD, Jack deals with all sorts of challenges every day: responding to emergencies, managing his officers, defending the department against City Hall and a corrupt mayor, and much more. - Solve Investigations and gather evidence against the criminal gangs of Freeburg. - Deal with the competing powers of the city. Everyone offers you favors, and each one comes at a price. Rich and fully voiced story: Jack Boyd is portrayed by Jon St. John, the voice of Duke Nukem.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Rotaeno
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$2.99 → Free [Free ~ $2.99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • 510 Stellar Gems：$4.99
  • 1030 Stellar Gems：$9.99
  • 100 Stellar Gems：$0.99
  • 2080 Stellar Gems：$19.99
  • 300 Stellar Gems：$2.95

Application Description

Rotaeno is a heart-pounding, thumb-tapping, wrist-flicking rhythm game that fully utilizes your device's gyroscope for an unprecedented musical experience. Rotate your device to hit notes as you soar through the stars. Drop into your headphones and immerse yourself in the kick beats and stellar synths of this astronautical adventure! =A Revolutionary Way to Experience Music= What sets Rotaeno apart is all in the name - rotation! Building on the basic controls of more traditional rhythm games, Rotaeno includes notes that require smooth turns and rapid rotations to hit, making it feel like you're drifting in a highspeed interstellar stunt race. It's a real arcade experience - in the palm of your hand! =Multi Genre Music and Beats= Rotaeno is loaded with exclusive tracks from renowned rhythm game composers. From EDM to JPOP, KPOP to Opera, the stylistically diverse song collection contains a future favorite song for every music lover! More songs are already planned for future updates and will be released on a regular basis. =A Journey to Find the Promised Land, Love, and Ourselves= Follow Ilot, our heroine, on a cosmic journey through the stars, and witness her growth as she sets out on her own. Follow in the footsteps of a friend, meet locals on different planets, and save the future of Aquaria! *Rotaeno will only function properly on devices that feature gyroscope or accelerometer support. Concerns or feedback? Contact us: rotaeno@xd.com

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Cytus II
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • Kizuna AI：$9.99 → $4.99 [$4.99 ~ $9.99]

All Price Information

Price：$1.99

In-App Purchases

  • Miku：$9.99
  • CAPSO：$9.99
  • ConneR：$9.99
  • Xenon：$9.99
  • 9 Characters：$34.99
  • Cherry：$9.99
  • Kizuna AI：$4.99
  • Nora：$9.99
  • Neko：$9.99
  • Marvelous Mix vol. 1：$4.99

Application Description

"Cytus II" is a music rhythm game created by Rayark Games. It's our fourth rhythm game title, following the footsteps of three global successes, "Cytus", "DEEMO" and "VOEZ". This sequel to "Cytus" brings back the original staff and is a product of hardwork and devotion. In the future, humans have redefined internet development and connections. We can now easily sync the real world with the internet world, changing life as we have known for thousands of years. In the mega virtual internet space cyTus, there exists a mysterious DJ legend Æsir. His music has an irresistible charm; people fall madly in love with his music. Rumor has it that every note and beat of his music hits the audiences in the depths of their souls. One day, Æsir, who had never shown his face before, suddenly announced that he will be holding the first mega virtual concert —— Æsir-FEST and will invite a top idol singer and a popular DJ as opening performances. The instant the ticket sales began, an unprecedented rush occurred. Everyone wanted to see Æsir's real face. On the day of the FEST, millions of people were connected to the event. At one hour before the event started, the previous world record for most simultaneous connection was smashed. The whole city was on its feet, waiting for Æsir to descent from the skies... Game Features: - The unique "Active Judgement Line" rhythm game playstyle Tap the notes as the judgement line hits them to achieve a high score. Through five different kinds of notes and the judgement line that actively adjusts its speed according to the beat, the gameplay experience is further combined with the music. Players can easily immerse themselves in the songs. - A total of 250+ high-quality songs (50+ in base game, 200+ as IAP) The game includes songs by composers from all across the world, Japan, Korea, the US, Europe, Taiwan and more. Through the characters, players get to play songs from different genres including but not limited to: electronic, rock and classical. We are confident that this game will live up to the hype and expectations. - Over 800 different charts Over 800 different charts designed, from easy to hard. The rich game content can satisfy players of different levels. Experience exciting challenges and enjoyment through the sensation of your fingertips. - Explore the virtual internet world with the game's characters The one-of-a-kind story system "iM" will lead the players and the in-game characters to slowly piece together the story and world behind "Cytus II". Reveal the truth of the story with a rich, cinematic visual experience. PAFF (CV:上坂すみれ Sumire Uesaka) NEKO (CV:花守ゆみり Yumiri Hanamori) Xenon (CV:関智一 Tomokazu Seki) ConneR (CV:竹内栄治 Eiji Takeuchi) Cherry (CV:ファイルーズあい Fairouz Ai) Nora (CV:石見舞菜香 Manaka Iwami) Ivy (CV:河瀬茉希 Maki Kawase) Vanessa (CV:楠木ともり Tomori Kusunoki) Rin (CV:能登麻美子 Mamiko Noto) ************************************************************* Cytus II will perform a connection authentication for its In-app purchases from time to time. If you discover during the authentication period that your IAP was lost due to your device not connecting to the internet, please make sure your device is connected to the internet. Afterwards, click "Restore Purchases" to recover your IAP. ************************************************************* ※ This game contains mild violence and vulgar language. Suitable for users age 15 and above. ※ This game contains additional in-app purchases. Please purchased base on personal interest and ability. Do not overspend. ※ Please pay attention to your game time and avoid addiction. ※ Please do not use this game for gambling or other illegal purposes.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad
